name: OpenAPI / Swagger Docs
description: Add OpenAPI 3.0 documentation to an Express API using tsoa or swagger-jsdoc. Generates /docs with Swagger UI and a machine-readable openapi.json at /api-docs.

steps.description: Check Express version and TypeScript config
Create tsoa config: entryFile, noImplicitAdditionalProperties, outputDirectory
Convert UserController to tsoa @Route, @Get, @Post decorators with @Body and @Path params
Register swagger-ui-express at /docs and mount generated routes
Add tsoa:spec and tsoa:routes scripts, run them in prebuild

steps.target: npm run tsoa:spec && npm run tsoa:routes

steps.description: Verify OpenAPI spec is served correctly

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Auto-generated, interactive API docs from your TypeScript types
